languages.text: "Как вам будет угодно, Ваша Светлость. Я немедленно спущусь в Сектор Бионика, чтобы подготовить все необходимое, и буду ожидать вас там".
"As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."
languages.original_text: "Как вам будет угодно, Ваша Светлость. Я немедленно спущусь в Сектор Бионика, чтобы подготовить все необходимое, и буду ожидать вас там".

traits.locale_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."
"As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."
"As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

languages.text: «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Bajaré al Sector Bionica inmediatamente para llevar a cabo los preparativos y le esperaré allí».
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Bajaré al Sector Bionica inmediatamente para llevar a cabo los preparativos y le esperaré allí».

languages.text: “遵命，大人。我将即刻前往仿生区，做好必要准备，并在那里恭候您。”
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，大人。我将即刻前往仿生区，做好必要准备，并在那里恭候您。”

languages.text: « Comme il vous plaira, Votre Seigneurie. Je me rends dans le secteur Bionica immédiatement pour accomplir les préparatifs nécessaires. Je vous attendrai sur place. »
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: « Comme il vous plaira, Votre Seigneurie. Je me rends dans le secteur Bionica immédiatement pour accomplir les préparatifs nécessaires. Je vous attendrai sur place. »

languages.text: "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gerekli hazırlıkları yapmak için vakit kaybetmeden Sektör Biyonika'ya inecek ve orada sizi bekleyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gerekli hazırlıkları yapmak için vakit kaybetmeden Sektör Biyonika'ya inecek ve orada sizi bekleyeceğim."

languages.text: 「ご意向に沿わせていただきます。私は遅滞なくセクター・ビオニカへ降りて必要な準備をいたします。そして、そこで貴方を待ち受けます。」
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: 「ご意向に沿わせていただきます。私は遅滞なくセクター・ビオニカへ降りて必要な準備をいたします。そして、そこで貴方を待ち受けます。」

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde im Sektor Bionica umgehend die erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen und dort auf Euch warten."
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I shall go down to the Sector Bionica without delay to make the necessary preparations, and I shall await you there."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde im Sektor Bionica umgehend die erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen und dort auf Euch warten."
